# ~/.bashrc — Termux bash config with pager helpers
# Generated by android-terminal-setup skill
# Source: ~/ after running source ~/.bashrc (or open new session)

# Auto-start Obsidian Bridge if not running
if ! pgrep -f "obsidian_server.py" > /dev/null; then
    mkdir -p ~/bin
    nohup python ~/bin/obsidian_server.py > ~/bin/obsidian_server.log 2>&1 &
fi

# ─── PAGER SETUP ───────────────────────────────────────────────
export PAGER=less
export MANPAGER='less -R'
export LESS='-R -F -X -i'
# -R  = show colors properly
# -F  = quit if output fits one screen
# -X  = don't clear screen on exit
# -i  = case-insensitive search

# ─── HELPERS ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Pipe long output through less:   your_command | l
alias l='less -R'
# Same, but exit immediately if output fits on one screen
alias ll='less -R -F -X'

# Scroll-friendly view for files:   r filename
alias r='less -R -N'

# Freeze terminal output
# (Ctrl+S = pause, Ctrl+Q = resume — built-in, no alias needed)
alias freeze="echo 'Terminal output PAUSED (Ctrl+S). Press Ctrl+Q to resume.'"

# Capture output to file + display, then read with r
# Usage:  cap your_command
cap() {
    local f="$HOME/tmp/capture-$$.log"
    mkdir -p "$HOME/tmp"
    "$@" 2>&1 | tee "$f"
    echo ""
    echo "── output also saved to: $f ──"
}

# Kill spamming process:   stfu process_name
stfu() {
    pkill -f "$1" 2>/dev/null && echo "Killed: $1" || echo "Process '$1' not found"
}

# ─── BUFFER & SCROLL ────────────────────────────────────────────
# Bigger history = more scrollback
export HISTSIZE=10000
export HISTFILESIZE=20000
